definition: Public evidence stratum for a source item
decision_rule: Assign from source origin and role; do not infer from content alone

allowed_values: CSP; CORS; HSTS; COEP; CORP; COOP; Permissions-Policy; mixed; unsupported
definition: Policy family directly implicated by the claim
decision_rule: Assign all families explicitly mentioned or semantically required
notes: Unsupported families cannot be positive evidence

allowed_values: normative; advisory; framework_default; migration; repair; release_change; troubleshooting; example
decision_rule: Use the smallest category supported by source text
notes: Multiple values allowed only if source has separable claims

allowed_values: enforce_script_restriction; nonce_based_strict_csp; allow_credentialed_cors; deny_public_credentialed_cors; enforce_https_only; cross_origin_isolation_without_embed_breakage; unknown
definition: Semantic intent class used by oracle
decision_rule: Assign only when claim states expected behavior clearly
notes: Unknown cannot be positive drift evidence

allowed_values: raw_header; framework_api; middleware_default; proxy_layer; report_only; documentation_recipe; release_note
definition: How policy is represented to developers
notes: Used to separate docs from generated headers

allowed_values: document_origin; resource_origin; request_mode; credentials_mode; scheme; resource_kind; rendering_mode; route_scope
decision_rule: Record only fields needed for reproduction
Positive evidence requires semantic_drift and non-ambiguous intent

allowed_values: csp_report_only_not_enforced; csp_effective_script_allowance; nonce_csp_static_render_incompatibility; cors_intended_credentialed_share_blocked; cors_reflected_origin_with_credentials; hsts_header_not_honored_over_http; hsts_policy_cleared_by_zero_max_age; coep_require_corp_blocks_cross_origin_resource; other
decision_rule: Assign from semantic rule and source claim
notes: Full protocol may add classes only before lock

definition: Whether a baseline can judge the fixture
decision_rule: Unsupported scope is not counted as false negative
Only source_verified items count after lock
